news.title: Why safety regulators closed their investigation into Tesla’s remote parking feature
news.summary: NHTSA closed its investigation into Tesla's "Actually Smart Summon" feature, saying that only a fraction of cases resulted in an incident, and that no incidents resulted in injury. Tesla has also issued a number of software updates.

news.title: Iran threatens ‘Stargate’ AI data centers
news.summary: Iran said it will target U.S.-linked data centers with new missile strikes, as the war between the U.S. and Iran escalates.

news.title: Apple plans Supreme Court appeal in Epic Games App Store battle — again
news.summary: Apple plans to ask the Supreme Court to review its App Store fight with Epic Games, as it challenges a ruling limiting its ability to charge fees on external payments.
